I`m Ivan Polozkov

+38 (099) 43-84-164 ivpolart@gmail.com

About me

I’m a front-end developer with 5 years of commercial experience, specializing in HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. Over the years, I’ve worked on a wide range of projects, from landing pages to fully editable websites, focusing on clean structure, responsiveness, and user-friendly interfaces.

I have solid experience building websites using WordPress and HubSpot, creating flexible and easily manageable solutions for clients. I pay close attention to code quality, scalability, and maintainability, ensuring that projects are not only visually appealing but also reliable and easy to update.

In addition, I have experience developing cross-platform email templates, which helped me build a strong attention to detail and a deep understanding of layout consistency across different environments and devices.

Currently, I’m активно expanding my skills in React and TypeScript, working on modern front-end approaches and building more dynamic, data-driven applications.

I’m a detail-oriented and responsible developer who enjoys solving real problems and continuously improving my skills. I’m open to new challenges and collaborations where I can bring value and grow as a front-end developer.

My Projects

Sites
Headphones LP

A modern landing page for a headphones brand, built with clean and maintainable code using HTML, CSS, and JS.

Business Growth LP

Site for a company to deal business scaling, developed with HTML, CSS, and JS and integrated into HubSpot. Built with a focus on performance, flexibility, and easy content management within the CMS.

Kajo LP

A modern landing page for a Kajo brand, built with clean and maintainable code using HTML, CSS, and JS.

Gamers Platform LP

Site for a gamers platform, built with clean and maintainable code using HTML, CSS, and JS and integrated into Wordpress.

Marketing Agency LP

A contemporary landing page for a marketing agency, crafted with clean, organized code using HTML, CSS, and JS.

Neon LP

A custom landing page built for WordPress with clean, responsive HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. Developed for easy content management and seamless integration into the CMS.

Skills

  • Pixel-perfect, responsive websites with HTML, CSS, JS, jQuery
  • Interactive interfaces with React and Vanilla JS
  • Gulp, Webpack for optimizing workflows
  • Create and maintain websites using WordPress, HubSpot, Marketo and Pardot
  • Interactive interfaces with React and Vanilla JS
  • Gulp, Webpack for optimizing workflows
  • Design and code email templates optimized for all major email clients
  • Ensure mobile and client compatibility using responsive email techniques
  • Work with design assets from Figma, Photoshop, and Adobe Illustrator
  • Confidently use various IDEs and code editors to suit different development needs
  • Apply basic Node.js for backend tasks or API integrations
  • Understand and work with SQL and NoSQL databases at a basic level
  • Collaborate effectively in development teams
  • Deliver production-ready code in commercial environments
